channel.title: My Cloud Networking, Automation and Triathlon Blog
channel.description: Recent content on My Cloud Networking, Automation and Triathlon Blog

item.description: Aviatrix - Cloud Networking Platform This section will contain all the content specifically created for Aviatrix solution. Aviatrix is a pure cloud networking solution that focus on deploying a multi-cloud networking architecure. This solution is compatible with all the cloud networking service providers like AWS, Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud Platform, Oracle Cloud Infrastructure and Alibaba. Most of the chapters here will focus on implementation, deployment and technology deep dives. A dedicated section will solely focus on designs and use cases.

Amazon Web Services This section will contain all the content specifically created for the Amazon Web Service Cloud provider. Networking will be the focus for this cloud service provider but other services will also be discussed in details. Table of Contents VPC Everything related to the network contruscts in AWS Create a VPC - ManualWalkthrough of a VPC creation in AWS Create a VPC - TerraformAutomate your VPC deployment with Infrastructure as code !
